text: Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You have been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You have been approved as a moderator. We are glad to have you!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You have been approved as an event_helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You have been approved as a member. Enjoy your time with us!
